text: You walk towards the garden, following the winding path.
The garden is quieter than the rest of the manor. Overgrown hedges, cracked stone paths. Pale flowers that seem to glow under the moonlight.

name: Richard
text: Hmm? What seems to be the problem, [Player Name]?

name: MainChar
text: I was just curious about the garden. It’s quite peaceful here.

name: Richard
text: I see. Well, I suppose it's a nice place to just sit and think.
You hum in agreement, you both sit in silence for a moment, the only sound being the rustling of leaves and the distant hoot of an owl.
After a while, Richard breaks the silence.

name: Richard
text: I suppose you didn't just come here to admire the flowers, did you?

name: MainChar
text: To be honest, no. I was hoping to talk to you about something.
You take a deep breath, trying to find the right words to say.

name: MainChar
text: Have we perhaps met before? I have a feeling that I know you from somewhere.
Richard looks at you for a moment, his expression unreadable. Before giving you a polite smile.

name: Richard
text: Not that I can recall. But I suppose it's possible. I'm not the best at remembering faces.

options.text: Ask why he came to the manor
